subject: Bluetooth not pairing with headset
description: User's wireless headset appears in Bluetooth list but pairing fails or headset connects then immediately disconnects.

ts_steps.title: Reset headset pairing
ts_steps.action: Vendor button combo to clear multipoint list if documented.

ts_steps.title: Pairing mode
ts_steps.action: Hold button until LED pattern per manual.

ts_steps.title: Bluetooth toggle Settings
ts_steps.action: Off 15s On — not only Control Center.

ts_steps.title: Move from interference
ts_steps.action: Away from router, microwave, USB-C hubs.

ts_steps.title: Headset firmware
ts_steps.action: Update via vendor app on another device if available.

internal_information: Multipoint limit, bad firmware, iOS BT glitch, interference.
